message:
feat(ops): expand observability with timeline analytics, state management, and soak tests

Operations/observability crate major expansion:

Core modules:
- state.rs (+766 lines): significant state management improvements
  with enhanced metric aggregation, health score computation, and
  historical state snapshots for trend analysis
- discovery.rs (+567 lines): enhanced service discovery with hardened
  NaN health check bypass prevention and zero-threshold pruning guards
- storage.rs: storage layer adjustments for new state management needs

Screens:
- screens/timeline.rs (+463 lines): new timeline visualization screen
  providing chronological view of system events, index operations, and
  health state transitions with interactive navigation
- screens/historical_analytics.rs: minor updates to align with new
  state management data structures

Testing:
- tests/ops_pty_snapshot_e2e.rs (+353 lines): end-to-end PTY snapshot
  tests validating the full TUI rendering pipeline for ops screens
- tests/soak_tests.rs (+375 lines): long-running soak tests for
  memory stability, metric accumulation drift, and state management
  under sustained load
- tests/data_pipeline_integration.rs (+135 lines): integration tests
  for the data ingestion and transformation pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
